footerDisplay: For help and documentation, visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/DM911-AI/homebridge-homepod-mini-music-sensor)

detectMusic.title: 🎵 Detect Music
detectMusic.description: Trigger sensor when music is playing

detectPodcasts.title: 🎙️ Detect Podcasts
detectPodcasts.description: Trigger sensor when podcasts/audiobooks are playing

detectMovies.title: 🎬 Detect Movies/TV
detectMovies.description: Trigger sensor when AirPlay video is playing

maxDuration.title: ⏱️ Max Duration (seconds)
maxDuration.description: Maximum duration of content to detect (filters out long podcasts/movies)

requireArtist.title: 🎤 Require Artist Field
requireArtist.description: Only trigger for content with artist metadata (filters out movies/TV)

updateInterval.title: 🔄 Update Interval (seconds)
updateInterval.description: How often to check playback status

deviceId.title: Device ID
deviceId.description: HomePod identifier without colons/dashes. Run: python3 -m pyatv.scripts.atvremote scan

isStereoPair.title: 🎵 Part of Stereo Pair
isStereoPair.description: Check this if this HomePod is part of a stereo pair. Both HomePods in the pair must have the SAME name and this box checked.

homepods.title: 🏠 Your HomePods (Legacy)
homepods.description: ⚠️ This field is deprecated. Please use 'devices' instead with 'deviceId' field.
